title: Insomnia and thalamocortical hyperarousal
abstract: Empirical EEG-fMRI study reports insomnia severity is associated with disrupted thalamocortical coupling, increased beta power, and altered default mode network connectivity.
notes: Population: adults with insomnia. Limitation: small sample.

title: Slow wave and spindle abnormalities in sleep
abstract: Review evidence suggests reduced slow wave activity and altered spindle generation in insomnia and poor sleep quality measured by PSQI.

title: White matter integrity and sleep quality
abstract: Empirical DTI and MRI findings show lower thalamic radiation FA may support a white matter integrity mechanism related to insomnia severity.
